title: Remove the sidekick button from the comments field

posts.author: AiMenuRob (Rob)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

It is wild to waste this much screen real-estate on a button that is completely useless to the vast vast majority of users. In a section that can’t be removed (comments on a row)
Please make this optional ASAP so we can get back to a reasonable workflow

What are you trying to achieve

Removal of the Ai-Sidekick button, from Monday for users who don’t want it.
Especially in places where it takes up real-estate like the item name.

posts.author: rbridges (Robin Bridges)
posts.cookedHtml:
You can do this through Admin→Customization→Features→Enable or disable AI features.

This will disable AI features for the entire company, though.
